evidence_quotes.quote: the problem of publishers disabling access to digital products after purchasing
preventing publishers from denying you access to a digital product that you have purchased should be added to the Digital Fairness Act.

paragraphs.text: Hi! The Digital Fairness Act seems like a good idea, but I was wondering if there has been any consideration towards tackling the problem of publishers disabling access to digital products after purchasing them? The Stop Destroying Videogames movement (which has almost a million and a half signatures as of writing this) has brought this issue up, and I feel as a EU citizen that preventing publishers from denying you access to a digital product that you have purchased should be added to the Digital Fairness Act. Thank you for taking the time to read this feedback and have a nice day :)
